finding: Some borrower or loan segments show elevated default rates.
recommended_action: Carry high-risk segment findings into feature engineering and business interpretation.

finding: Some numeric columns have material IQR outlier rates.
recommended_action: Review skewness and use train-only transformations where needed. Do not cap in EDA.

finding: Some numeric features are strongly correlated.
recommended_action: Review for redundant features and modelling stability.

finding: Sensitive or proxy-sensitive fields exist in the data.
recommended_action: Exclude from baseline modelling; retain only for approved governance/fairness review.

finding: Repayment-derived variables exist and may leak target information depending on timing.
recommended_action: Use repayment-derived variables for monitoring only unless prediction timing is formally justified.
